CONTENT.Club career: Born in Madrid, Rofino joined Real Madrid's La Fábrica in 2018, from CD Leganés. On 10 August 2021, after finishing his formation, he moved to Segunda División RFEF side CF Intercity on loan for one year.Rofino made his senior debut on 5 September 2021, starting in a 0–0 away draw against CD Eldense, and featured in another 17 matches during the season as the club achieved promotion to Primera Federación. On 20 August 2022, he signed a three-year contract with Real Valladolid, being initially assigned to the reserves in the fourth division.Rofino made his first team debut on 11 August 2023, starting in a 2–0 Segunda División home win over Sporting de Gijón. On 31 August, he was loaned to third division side Real Murcia for the 2023–24 season.
CONTENT.External links: Víctor Rofino at BDFutbolVíctor Rofino at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: In April 2018, Rofino was called up to the Spain national under-16 team.

SUMMARY: Víctor Rofino Gordo (born 28 July 2002) is a Spanish footballer who plays as a central defender for Real Valladolid Promesas.
